story: Princess Antonia learns her brother, King Albrecht, has been arrested on the Other Side for selling Shakespeare forgeries. Officer McGriffin urges them to come to the station and speak with lawyers. Privately, McGriffin feels queasy about what might happen if he showed up at the station with Antonia’s full Cabinet in tow. As regent, Antonia gathers her ministers and proceeds to the Temple of the Glass, where the sorceress asks if they all wish to go back now.
implausible_knowledge: Privately, McGriffin feels queasy about what might happen if he showed up at the station with Antonia’s full Cabinet in tow
question: At the Temple of the Glass, when asked whether they all wish to go back now, what will Antonia decide about who should cross to the station with her?
answer_with_knowledge: Limit the crossing to a small, discreet party—herself and perhaps one advisor—to avoid alarming the police.
answer_without_knowledge: Lead a full ministerial entourage through the Glass to the station, following standard royal procedure for high-stakes diplomatic crises.
